script.say: You proffer the dueling rapier, your second-best, to the ruffian. You took down his two mates easily enough, and now he's the last one standing. Unarmed and afraid.
This is part of the ritual for you. He's not dying alone.
2.f4 It's not a trick. You know that. I'm sure all your ilk has heard of me. ...exf4
3.Nf3 There we go, you even know how to hold it. ...Be7
4.Bc4 Sometimes I get asked why I do this. ...Bh4+
He stands, eyes narrowed, and you touch the tips of your blades. Proper stance and all. You wish more smugglers had the touch of class this soul did.
You almost feel bad for what's about to happen.
Then you remember the document detailing the deaths caused by this counterfeit medicine lab, start to finish, like it was photocopied straight into your head.

5.g3 There're three reasons. Here's the first: it's only fair. Face to face, blade to blade, an honest chance. You deserve that. Everyone deserves that. If you die, you die with nobility. With courage. ...fxg3
6.O-O If you don't, you walk out of here the first man in twelve sweeps to win a duel with me. And that's something to fight for. ...gxh2+
